meta.description: My name is Jhomar Nando, but you can call me Joe. I am a Front-end developer with over 15 years of experience in application development, known for meeting deadlines, time management, accurate research, and effectiveness in problem-solving solutions.

hero.avatarAlt: Hi, I am Goku, I mean, Joe!

about.title: about.
about.bio1: My name is Jhomar Nando, but you can call me Joe. I am a Front-end developer with more than 15 years of experience in application development, known for meeting deadlines, time management, accurate research, and effective problem-solving solutions.
about.bio2: I have a degree in Systems Analysis and Development from Uninove, an MBA in IT Management from XP Educação, and have worked in various companies in the financial, healthcare, advertising markets, major portals, and newspapers.

portfolio.title: portfolio.
portfolio.heading: Portfolio
portfolio.intro: Here are some projects I have been involved in as a Front-end developer, working both independently (as a freelancer), and as part of teams in various agencies.

clients.title: clients.
clients.heading: Clients
clients.description: Here are some of the clients I have worked with, whether as a freelancer, service provider, or employee.

print3d.title: 3d printing.
print3d.heading: 3D Printing
print3d.intro: I'm starting my journey in the 3D printing world with a Bambu Lab A1. Here you'll find the projects I've created — click to watch the Reel on Instagram!
